segments.text: Samus is getting the first hit in
segments.original_text: 先に触っているのはサムス側
掴みが通り続けている

segments.text: All those reads are paying off right now
segments.original_text: さあ今までの読み合いが回った結果がここに来て

segments.text: Will it translate to concrete results?
segments.original_text: 着実に成果となっているか?
滑り横強から上強攻撃!
あわや撃墜かというところ

segments.text: Still not quite the KO though
segments.original_text: まだ撃墜はしませんが

full_text: Samus is getting the first hit in Grabs keep connecting! All those reads are paying off right now Will it translate to concrete results? Forward tilt to up tilt! Almost an early KO! Still not quite the KO though Wait—that's the KO!
